metadata.description: Cursor plugin marketplace for uuApp Framework tools and conventions

plugins.name: uu-app-dev-toolkit
plugins.description: Developer toolkit for uuApp Framework (UAF) projects. Coding conventions, endpoint generators, and MCP configuration for uuApp server development.

plugins.name: uu-app-essentials
plugins.description: Essential skills for working with uuApp applications. Document editing, content management, and daily operations for all users.

plugins.name: third-party-tools
plugins.description: Curated collection of general-purpose skills, rules, agents, commands, and integrations from the broader Cursor and developer community
